title: Integrated Applied Modeling and Communication · Decision Notebook: Model Cycle
summary: Answer an unfamiliar community planning question from raw requirements through a defensible recommendation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math beg model cycle increment in an independently validated applied-math decision packet. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Iterate through question, assumptions, variables, model, computation, validation, and communication.
Publish inputs, method, version, results, limitations, and rerun instructions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-beginner cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

# Add one tested model increment per activity.
